name: security-audit-preflight-fragment
description: Reusable gate fragment for the source-code security audit service. Verifies the static-analysis toolchain (semgrep), the git working copy, and the target directory before any scan side-effects. Emits a standard preflight_result channel.

params.cmd: set -e; test -d "{{target_dir}}" || { echo "[preflight] target_dir not found: {{target_dir}}" >&2; exit 1; }; command -v semgrep >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo "[preflight] semgrep not installed (brew install semgrep / pip install semgrep)" >&2; exit 1; }; command -v git >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo "[preflight] git not available" >&2; exit 1; }; echo "[preflight] ok: target=\"{{target_dir}}\" semgrep=$(semgrep --version 2>/dev/null | head -1)"
